hub_ops_base_intro.title: Operations Base
hub_ops_base_intro.text: Late 2026. Rain ticks against emergency floodlights while the expedition team regroups in a ruined signal base. Beyond the shutters waits the Rain Toll Corridor, a short but hostile district warped by bells, transit steel, and ash.

overpass_watch_intro.title: Overpass Watch
overpass_watch_intro.text: An elevated roadway buckles under cathedral stone. A Rustbound Pilgrim drags its bell-metal blade through the rain while ivy crawls across the guardrail.

flooded_arcade_intro.title: Flooded Arcade
flooded_arcade_intro.text: Neon signage flickers beneath rising water. A Flood Acolyte chants in the puddles while a Switchblade Drone skates between broken kiosks.

service_niche_intro.title: Service Niche
service_niche_intro.text: You find a dry maintenance recess behind a humming panel. The team can patch wounds, rewire defenses, or prepare for the toll plaza ahead.

witness_chapel_intro.title: Witness Chapel
witness_chapel_intro.text: A transit chapel flickers with cheap halos. A Veil Leech hangs in the rafters while a Lamp Witness raises its glass lantern toward your party.

toll_plaza_intro.title: Toll Plaza
toll_plaza_intro.text: The lanes narrow into a dead checkpoint under immense bells. A Toll Knight waits motionless among cracked barriers and drowned ticket booths.

bell_tower_intro.title: Bell Tower Threshold
bell_tower_intro.text: At the district heart, a tilted bell tower grows out of the overpass itself. The Bell Warden steps forward, pulling heat and ash from every toll the city forgot.
